message:
feat(done): respect convoy merge strategy (gt-myofa.3)

When a polecat runs gt done, it now queries its convoy for the merge
strategy and branches accordingly:
- direct: pushes branch to default branch (main), bypasses refinery
- mr: current behavior - creates MR bead, refinery processes (default)
- local: skips push and MR creation, keeps work on feature branch

Adds getConvoyMergeStrategyForIssue helper to look up convoy tracking
the current issue and extract its merge strategy. Includes merge
strategy in witness notification for observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
